details.reasoning: Implementation is comprehensive and meets all requirements: (1) New provider package `@ai-sdk/pixelart` created with proper package.json structure; (2) `createPixelArt()` factory function exported; (3) `PixelArtProvider` interface implements image model creation via `.image()` and `.imageModel()` methods; (4) `PixelArtImageModel` class implements `ImageModelV3` with `doGenerate()` method (correct for AI SDK v3 API); (5) Image settings fully support size, style enum ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit'), and pixelDensity (1-16 range); (6) Base URL correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'; (7) Follows AI SDK provider patterns with TypeScript configs, vitest setup, proper exports, and CHANGELOG; (8) Only new files created under `packages/pixelart/` with minimal necessary tsconfig.json reference addition. Comprehensive test coverage included. Minor: Implementation is production-ready with excellent structure and error handling.
